title: Displaying multiple lines on a Dashboard calendar
excerpt: Hi there, I am trying to figure out how to display more lines on the dashboard calendar.  As you can see in the image, only two lines are shown on the calendar but there are four projects for the date selected - I want t…

posts.author: alan.ramsay (Alan Ramsay)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there, I am trying to figure out how to display more lines on the dashboard calendar. As you can see in the image, only two lines are shown on the calendar but there are four projects for the date selected - I want to see all four on the calendar. thank you.

image987×637 36.2 KB

posts.author: JayHayashi (Jay Lim)
posts.cookedHtml:
I think the only way is to reduce your display size.

image2612×1400 163 KB

posts.author: alan.ramsay (Alan Ramsay)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Jay, many thanks for the reply - how did you adjust the display size? I tried to do that reducing the browser “zoom” setting but it didn’t help my display…

image1039×747 26.3 KB

posts.author: JayHayashi (Jay Lim)
posts.cookedHtml:
HI Alan
Did you open your calendar to a full screen?

image874×410 13.5 KB

What I did was just CTRL+{Zoom using my mouse} or you can use this zoom function if you have.
image708×340 15.7 KB

posts.author: alan.ramsay (Alan Ramsay)
posts.cookedHtml: Many thanks Jay - that worked - going full screen and then adjusting the zoom on the browser. A pity that doesn’t seem to work in non full screen mode but pleased to get the solution - thank you!
